qraTrust.label: System-Test Ready
qraTrust.use_policy: Use current QRAs as plausible corpus artifacts for testing Sparta Explorer, Sparta Chat, /create-evidence-case, retrieval, and conversation-lab workflows; do not present them as Aerospace Corp expert-blessed answers.
qraTrust.next_action: After SPARTA Corpora and Explorer surfaces are complete, route current QRAs through Aerospace Corp cybersecurity expert evaluation and blessing metadata.

remediation_plans.rationale: Prompt Health is a lane subagent: it may scan prompt units, classify best-practices-prompt failures, and prepare review-prompt payloads automatically; prompt text edits remain review-gated unless the patch is mechanical and all prompt gates pass.
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Let the Prompt Health lane generate review-prompt payloads; approve only narrow prompt edits with passing prompt-health and canary checks.
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
suggested_checks: run best-practices-prompt against failed prompt units
run review-prompt for any non-mechanical prompt rewrite
run a prompt parity/canary before production QRA generation
